title: Tokenable Furnaces and Storage
description: Adds several new types of Chests, Trapped Chests, Barrels, Hoppers, Shulkers, Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, Smokers, and Bundles that are faster and more efficient than vanilla counterparts.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/iDpwQbpxsyE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds several new types of Chests, Trapped Chests, Barrels, Hoppers, Shulkers, Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, Smokers, and Bundles that are faster and more efficient than vanilla counterparts.

Craft a token by surrounding a plank with Iron ingots. Upgrade that token by surrounding it with Gold ingots. Sneak + Right click on any Vanilla or Sentimentality Chests, Trapped Chests, Barrels, Hoppers, Shulkers, Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, and Smokers to upgrade them. 

# You must upgrade through each tier in order.


Iron Tier stores 2x vanilla, Gold 4x vanilla, Diamond 8x vanilla, Amethyst 16x vanilla, Netherite 8x vanilla and blastproof.


![infographic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BTAJkDUv/images/e18d3571ae4afccc61ce224fe2ac274d24fbf5a0.png)

Vanilla Bundles are now craftable in this mod using the Snapshot recipe.

All Netherite upgrades are blast resistant equal to Obsidian, as well as fireproof.

Netherite and Amethyst are mutually exclusive. 

Bundles are +1 stack per tier instead of 2x previous tier.

Hopper upgrade tiers can be configured to move more items per tick, multiplied by the tier.

Furnaces can be configured to increase fuel efficiency in addition to speed.
